sections.section_title: Current criminal-law screening marker for fraud, forgery, threat, or intimidation facts
sections.text: DEMO LAW PACK: Simplified educational placeholder. Replace with official BNS text before real-world use. Use this current-law marker only for screening facts such as forged documents, fake signatures, threats, blackmail, dishonest inducement, physical intimidation, theft, misappropriation, or fraud-like allegations.
sections.source_authority: Demo placeholder law pack; replace with India Code / Legislative Department source
